title: What have each of you found to be the best time tracking integration?
excerpt:

posts.author: JessicaK (Jessica Klaustermeier)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to switch to start using monday.com but I am struggling for what to use to get good time tracking data. From what I can tell it seems that the in app feature is worthless for my needs.

I simply want to be able to pull a report at the end of the month and see time breakdowns by project, task, user, date.

Has anybody found another app that integrates well and is providing what they need for this?

posts.author: LukasAvisi (Lukas van Paridon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jessica,

We have developed Tracket to do exactly what you are asking for. Visit Tracket in the monday.com marketplace and start your free 21-day trial right away. We also give free group demo’s, register Here.

Hopefully this is useful.

Kind regards,

Lukas van Paridon
Avisi Apps
